title: HolidayLib
description: A rendering library for my own mods to render custom player skins and add compatibility for other shader mods.
body:
A rendering library for my own mods allowing for custom player render layers and tints while keeping compatibility with shaders.
Other developers can use this library to keep compatibility with mods made with HolidayLib.

This library includes:
- Pre-made Translucent Emissive Render Layers that support Depth Masks
- Fallback Render Layers/Colors when Shaders are Enabled
- Customizing a player's skin tint and render layer, with a priority system so mods can over-ride eachother properly
- Player tints/render layers show up in the Player List (when that player is in range).

That's it. Merry christmas!
